PARASITE just became the first ever Korean film to be nominated for Best Foreign Language Film at the Golden Globes. It has bigger accolades behind and in front of it, but a significant milestone nonetheless.

3 nominations for PARASITE, a Korean film, at the Golden Globes. For Best Director (Bong Joon-ho), Best Screenplay (Bong Joon-ho & Han Jin-won) and Best Foreign Language Film. What a time to be alive. #기생충

quote.msg:
PARASITE just became the first ever Korean film to be nominated for Best Foreign Language Film at the Golden Globes. It has bigger accolades behind and in front of it, but a significant milestone nonetheless.

3 nominations for PARASITE, a Korean film, at the Golden Globes. For Best Director (Bong Joon-ho), Best Screenplay (Bong Joon-ho & Han Jin-won) and Best Foreign Language Film. What a time to be alive. #기생충

replies.msg: 實至名歸

Speechless 竟然落選了
Frozen不送Show yourself，無論歌曲本身還是配合劇情的昇華都更好。

Parasite 冇提名 Best picture?

Best Foreign Film 一定攞硬，但冇Best Picture 提名唔合理，定係Golden Globe Best Picture 唔受外語片玩？印象中上年Roma都冇Best Picture 提名

最佳電影呢五套實有份,
1917、愛爾蘭人、上流寄生族、從前...有個荷里活、婚姻故事
我諗剩餘位置會係小丑、 教宗的承繼、陽光兔仔兵
如果去到9或10部提名電影就包埋福特決戰法拉利、小婦人

原創劇本好難揀
Noah Baumbach vs QT vs 奉俊昊
牙奉尾機到
De Niro入唔到圍

原創劇本唔難揀

QT請收皮，唔使旨意平Woody Allen記錄

Netflix有四套片入圍
仆佢個街真係好唔慣要係屋企睇咁多獎季片

quote.msg: De Niro入唔到圍

replies.msg:
而家影帝穩陣係得Adam Driver同Joquin Phoenix,
Antonio Banderas雖然憑外語片入圍, 但有影評人及金球獎加持, 入圍機會都大增,
剩低兩個位就Leonardo DiCarpio, Robert De Niro, Jonathan Pryce,
Eddie Murphy, Christian Bale 爭, 真係各有各優劣勢,
DiCarpio + De Niro (提名電影係大熱門, 但配角比主角出眾)
Pryce (英國佬鐵票, 但Netflix戲4個男主角都有介票)
Murphy (黑人鐵票, 但4個netflix男主角中呼聲比較低)
Bale (提名常客, 但電影本身唔係大熱門, 難以突圍)
仲有冷門 Adam Sandler, 影評人獎都有吹捧吓, Bafta又有機會提名Taron Egerton
總結: 個人覺得5強會係 Adam Driver, Joquin Phoenix, Jonathan Pryce, Antonio Banderas, Robert De Niro

quote.msg: De Niro入唔到圍
